mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT kb.* FROM kb_knowledge_base kb LEFT JOIN kb_kb_member m ON kb.id = m.kb_id WHERE kb.owner_id = #{userId} OR m.user_id = #{userId} OR kb.visibility = 'PUBLIC' ORDER BY kb.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_knowledge_base (name, description, workspace_id, owner_id, visibility, search_alpha, search_top_k, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{workspaceId}, #{ownerId}, #{visibility}, #{searchAlpha}, #{searchTopK}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, visibility = #{visibility}, search_alpha = #{searchAlpha}, search_top_k = #{searchTopK}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
